content: Bitsika - Crypto Virtual Cards - KYC in 1 Hour
Get a Virtual Visa Debit Card with KYC approved in 1 hour. Pay with Bitcoin, USDT or other crypto. Compliant and user-friendly. Usable in 200+ countries. Can add to Apple Pay, Google Pay & PayPal.
Get a **Crypto Virtual Card** with **KYC Approved in 1 Hour**. Top up with **Bitcoin**, **USDT**, or other crypto.

Bitsika Virtual Cards are prepaid, reloadable, and usable in **over 200 countries** for online shopping. Fast KYC verification means you're ready to spend quickly. They're also compatible with **Apple Pay, Google Pay, and PayPal**.
Top Up with Cryptocurrencies Like Bitcoin and USDT

You can fund your Bitsika Virtual Card using cryptocurrencies like Bitcoin and USDT on supported networks such as BTC, ERC20 or BEP20. Once Bitcoin or USDT is deposited into your Bitsika balance, you can immediately use it to create or top up your virtual cards. Funding with crypto lets you create and use your card from any country without relying on traditional banking or mobile money. It's fast, flexible, and works globally.

Bitsika requires KYC verification to ensure compliance with financial regulations, but we've streamlined the process to be incredibly fast and user-friendly. On average, your KYC is approved within 1 hour of submission. Simply provide your ID and basic information, and our automated system will verify your account quickly. This means you can go from signing up to having a ready-to-use card in about an hour, combining regulatory compliance with the convenience our users love. **Learn more about our KYC and AML Policy**
Apple Pay, Google Pay and PayPal Support

You can use your Bitsika Virtual Card on digital wallets like Apple Pay, Google Pay, and PayPal for seamless online transactions. Here's how to set it up:  1. Generate your virtual card on the Bitsika platform.  2. Add the card to your preferred wallet on Apple Pay, Google Pay, or PayPal.  3. Once approved, your card will be ready for secure payments through the wallet.  Now you can enjoy hassle-free spending wherever these wallets are accepted.
Use on OnlyFans for Added Privacy

A Bitsika Virtual Visa card is one of the safest and most discreet ways to pay for OnlyFans. You can create your card using an alias, which helps protect your privacy when subscribing. This ensures OnlyFans does not appear on your personal bank or mobile money statements. Funding the card with cryptocurrency like Bitcoin and USDT adds another layer of privacy, giving you a secure payment method from anywhere in the world while maintaining compliance through our quick KYC process.

Bitsika Virtual Cards are prepaid, meaning you load a custom amount before using them. This gives you the flexibility to create cards with the exact funds needed by you. We offer two types:  Standard Prepaid Cards: Ideal for one-time online payments. Generated instantly, they can only be topped up once after creation.  Premium Prepaid Cards: Perfect for recurring transactions and long-term use. These can be reloaded indefinitely, offering a convenient and reliable payment option. Loved by our users, 70% choose Premium Cards for their flexibility.
Bitsika Visa Debit Cards are Virtual

The Bitsika Virtual Card is a digital Visa debit card with a card number, expiry date, and CVV like a regular card, but no physical form. As a debit card, every payment comes directly from your loaded balance, so you can only spend what you fund. The cards are issued by Visa, making them globally accepted for online payments and mobile wallets like Apple Pay, Google Pay, and PayPal. You can top up instantly with Bitcoin or USDT and manage everything inside the Bitsika app.

Bitsika requires KYC verification to maintain compliance with financial regulations, but we've made the process remarkably quick. Your KYC is typically approved within 1 hour of submission, allowing you to start using your virtual card almost immediately. Simply submit your ID and basic information through the app, and our streamlined verification system will process your application swiftly. Once approved, you receive your card number, CVV, billing address, and expiry date, so you can start paying online right away. Most users complete the entire process from download to active card in about an hour.

Bitsika offers both Visa Gift Cards and Virtual Visa Debit Cards. A Visa Gift Card comes with a fixed balance for one time or limited use and cannot be reloaded once spent, but you can fund it with Bitcoin, USDT or other crypto.  A Virtual Visa Debit Card is reloadable and flexible, letting you top up with crypto anytime for subscriptions, online shopping and daily payments. With features like balance management, freeze and unfreeze and instant reloads, the Virtual Visa Debit Card gives you more control, while the Gift Card is best for simple one off payments or gifting.

Each Bitsika Virtual Visa card can be topped up with as much as $500,000 per month, giving you the freedom to handle high-value transactions with ease. There's no cap on how many individual cards you can create, so you can separate spending across different cards for shopping, subscriptions, business expenses, or personal use. This combination of high limits and unlimited card creation gives you flexibility that most other virtual card providers simply do not offer.

Bitsika Virtual Cards can be used in more than 200 countries. They can be created and topped up with cryptocurrencies like Bitcoin and USDT, allowing users anywhere in the world to shop online, pay for subscriptions, and make secure payments. This makes Bitsika a truly global virtual card service.

With Bitsika, you stay in full control of your virtual cards. Freeze or unfreeze them instantly, create as many as you need for different purposes, and hide or reveal sensitive details like the card number or CVV at any time. The app is protected with a PIN for secure access, and you receive real-time transaction notifications so you can spot any suspicious activity right away. If your card details are ever compromised, you can replace them instantly to keep your payments secure.  Key security features: — Freeze and unfreeze cards instantly — Create unlimited virtual cards for different purposes — Hide or reveal sensitive card details anytime — App protected with a secure PIN — Real-time transaction notifications — Instantly replace card details if compromised

Bitsika Virtual Visa cards are issued by a third-party partner under license from Visa, ensuring global acceptance and compliance with industry standards. We require KYC verification to maintain regulatory compliance and prevent financial crimes. Our platform meets PCI DSS security requirements and uses SSL encryption to protect your payment data. All transactions are processed securely on the Visa network.

Bitsika Virtual Cards are designed for online use, but adding them to mobile wallets like Apple Pay, Google Pay or PayPal lets you spend in physical stores where these wallets are accepted. This way, your virtual card becomes usable in-person without needing a plastic card, giving you more flexibility while keeping the convenience and security of a virtual payment method.
How to Create and Activate Your Bitsika Virtual Card in 3 Easy Steps

Download the Bitsika app, create your account, and submit your KYC documents. Your verification will typically be approved within 1 hour. Once approved, deposit crypto like Bitcoin and USDT using one of the supported networks. Your balance will be ready as soon as the deposit is confirmed.
In the app, tap "Create Virtual Card" and choose your card type. Your card number, expiry date, CVV, and billing address will appear instantly.
Use it directly for online payments and subscriptions or add your new card to Apple Pay, Google Pay, PayPal. Start spending right away with secure transactions worldwide.
Can I fund my Bitsika Virtual Card with crypto?
Yes. You can fund the Bitsika Virtual Card with crypto like Bitcoin and USDT on supported networks like BTC, ERC20 and BEP20.
Do I need to submit KYC for the Bitsika Virtual Card?
Yes. Bitsika requires KYC verification for compliance, but the process is fast and user-friendly. Your KYC is typically approved within 1 hour of submission.
Can I add my Bitsika Virtual Card to Apple Pay, Google Pay, and PayPal?
Yes. Bitsika Virtual Cards work with Apple Pay, Google Pay, and PayPal for seamless payments.
Can I use the Bitsika Virtual Card on OnlyFans?
Yes. Bitsika Virtual Cards work on OnlyFans and allow you to subscribe with enhanced privacy through crypto funding and alias use.
Is the Bitsika Virtual Card prepaid?
Yes. You load funds on the Bitsika Virtual Card before use, giving you control over your spending.
Is the Bitsika Virtual Card reloadable?
Yes. Premium Bitsika Virtual Cards can be topped up and reloaded indefinitely, making them ideal for recurring payments.
What is the Bitsika Virtual Card?

Bitsika Virtual Card is a digital Visa debit card you can create after quick KYC verification with crypto like Bitcoin and USDT to pay for stuff online, subscribe to services, or add to mobile wallets.
How quickly can I get my Bitsika Virtual Card?
After completing KYC verification (typically approved within 1 hour), you can create and start using your Bitsika Virtual Card immediately.
Can the Bitsika Virtual Card be used in person?
Yes. When added to Apple Pay, Google Pay or PayPal, you can tap and pay in stores worldwide with the Bitsika Virtual Card.
What are the spending limits on the Bitsika Virtual Card?
Each Bitsika Virtual Card supports up to $500,000 in monthly top-ups, with no limit on the number of cards you create.
How many Bitsika Virtual Cards can I create?
You can create as many Bitsika Virtual Cards as you need, for one-time use or ongoing payments.
How many countries can I use the Bitsika Virtual Cards in?
Bitsika Virtual Cards can be used in over 200 countries, anywhere Visa and mobile wallets are accepted.
Is the Bitsika Virtual Card international?
Yes. Bitsika Virtual Cards are globally accepted for online and in-person payments in over 200 countries.
Who is the Bitsika Virtual Card for?

The Bitsika Virtual Visa Card is designed for a wide variety of users who need fast, flexible, and secure payments. Freelancers can spend their crypto earnings directly online, while international students can pay for tuition, subscriptions, and services without being limited by local bank restrictions. Gamers benefit from instant access to credits, top-ups, and in-game items on global platforms, and online shoppers can purchase from international e-commerce sites that might not accept local payment methods. Content subscribers on platforms like OnlyFans, as well as streaming or SaaS services, enjoy enhanced privacy when paying with crypto funding. Remote workers and digital nomads use Bitsika across more than 200 countries, while entrepreneurs and small businesses can create multiple cards to manage staff or project expenses. Privacy-conscious users also prefer Bitsika since transactions remain separate from their personal bank records. With fast KYC approval (typically within 1 hour), Bitcoin and USDT funding, and global acceptance, Bitsika is a modern, compliant solution that serves anyone who wants a powerful alternative to traditional bank cards.
How secure is the Bitsika Virtual Card?

Bitsika Virtual Cards can be frozen or deleted anytime. Details can be hidden, the app is PIN-protected, and transactions use SSL and PCI DSS security. KYC verification adds an additional layer of compliance and security.
What fees apply to the Bitsika Virtual Card?
A small fee applies when creating or topping up Bitsika Virtual Cards. There are no hidden charges.
What happens if my Bitsika Virtual Card is charged incorrectly?
You can request a refund or dispute the transaction directly in the Bitsika app with our support team.
Download Bitsika today and create your Virtual Visa Card with KYC approved in about an hour.
Create unlimited Virtual Visa Cards with fast KYC verification by downloading Bitsika today.
Ready to shop worldwide? Get started with Bitsika and have your KYC approved within an hour.
How Bitsika Virtual Cards Compare to Other Virtual Card Apps, Bank Apps, and Visa Gift Cards

Bitsika Visa Virtual Cards stand out when compared to cards from other platforms. While other virtual card apps, bank-issued cards, and Visa gift cards each have their strengths, Bitsika combines instant crypto funding, fast KYC verification (approved in 1 hour), global reach, and full spending control in a way that others can't. The table below shows how Bitsika stacks up across the most important factors for choosing a virtual payment card.
